creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
If we need to choose which one to keep in ports tree between pfetch and pfetch-rse, it would likely be pfetch-rs. The upstream pfetch repository has been publicly archived, no longer developed. We do not need to remove pfetch from ports tree right now as it works with any issues at the moment. However, it may be considered for removal in a few years, as we do with other ports which has been abandoned upstream.

+1 from me for adding pfetch-rs to ports tree.
